task_completion.description: Verify the credit note is being created for the correct customer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Northstar Industrial Solutions' in the Customer field of the invoice or credit note screen in Odoo.

task_completion.description: Verify the credit note contains the correct items and partial quantities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the invoice/credit note lines. There should be exactly 8 'Industrial Safety Helmets' and 12 'High-Visibility Safety Vests'. The original quantities (20 and 30) should not be used.

task_completion.description: Verify the total refund amount is correct.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Total amount on the credit note. It must be exactly $744.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the credit note has been posted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the status indicator in the top right of the credit note form. It should say 'Posted' (and not 'Draft').

task_completion.description: Verify the refund payment has been registered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a green 'Paid' or 'In Payment' banner/ribbon on the credit note, or check that the 'Amount Due' is $0.00 after clicking 'Register Payment'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web interface to process the refund.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Odoo ERP system, not terminal commands executing SQL queries or Python scripts to modify the database.

integrity.description: Verify the credit note was actually created in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface should show standard UI elements like breadcrumbs (e.g., Invoices / Credit Notes), action buttons, and chatter history at the bottom of the record.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Customer Name: Northstar Industrial Solutions. Original Invoice Amount: $1860.00. Expected Refund Amount: $744.00. Return Items: 8x 'Industrial Safety Helmet' (Price: $45.00) and 12x 'High-Visibility Safety Vest' (Price: $32.00).
